title: Public participation process: George Comprehensive Integrated Transport Plan 2023 - 2028
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - George Municipality has prepared a draft Comprehensive Integrated Transport Plan (CITP) to guide transport planning, infrastructure investment and service improvements over the next five years.


> The Comprehensive Integrated Transport Plan (CITP) provides a strategic framework to guide transport infrastructure and service improvements across George.


Its purpose is to promote accessible, safe, and affordable mobility for all residents while integrating land use and transport planning in alignment with the municipality’s Integrated Development Plan (IDP), thereby supporting sustainable development in the city.

The draft CITP will be available for public review for a 30-day period from 01 October 2025 to 30 October 2025. During this time, interested and affected parties are invited to study the plan and submit their comments.


> Where to access the draft CITP documentation:


Online:

Via the George Municipality website at https://www.george.gov.za to download the draft CITP and supporting documents.

Using WhatsApp Chat Bot (077 451 6373)

Hard copies: Available at Municipal Facilities

Uniondale Library

Haarlem Library

George Library

Interested and Affected Parties (I&APs) must review the draft CITP and submit comments within the 30-day period between 01 October 2025 to 30 October 2025.

You can submit comments by:

- Completing the online comment form (scan the QR code below or visit https://bit.ly/George_CITP_Feedback_Form).
- Completing the hard copy (available at the above listed Libraries)
- WhatsApp message to 077 451 6373 and follow the prompts.

E-mail queries to: [email protected]. Must include full name, home address, e-mail, contact number.

OPEN DAY PUBLIC ENGAGEMENTDate & Time:8 October 2025 (09:00-13:00)9 October 2025 (09:00-13:00)9 October 2025 (14:00-18:00)10 October 2025 (09:00-13:00)Venue:George LibraryUniondale LibraryHaarlem LibraryWilderness Christian Fellowship

Contact person:

Name: James Robb Email: [email protected]

George Municipality places a high premium on the privacy and personal information of our stakeholders.

Personal information provided for purposes of this public participation process will be processed in terms of the Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA), Act 4 of 2013.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
